data.description: Mountain View, California - On August 7, 2025, LegalZoom.com, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol LZ.

data.title: Key Tronic Corp. (Nasdaq: KTCC) to report Q4 and FY results for fiscal 2025 on August 27, 2025 after market close.
data.description: Key Tronic Corporation, based in Spokane Valley, Washington, revealed on Aug. 7, 2025, that it intends to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025 subsequent to the close of the market on August 27, 2025. The company, listed as Nasdaq: KTCC, will provide details about its performance during this period.

data.title: ePlus (NASDAQ: PLUS) declares first quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share, to be paid in Sept.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, ePlus inc., a prominent technology solutions provider based in Herndon, Virginia, declared its inaugural quarterly dividend. The Board of Directors of ePlus inc. announced the decision to pay a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. Shareholders can expect to receive this dividend on September...

data.title: Marpai will host webcast on Aug 14, 2025 to discuss Q2 2025 financial results. Conference call at 8:30am ET in Tampa.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on August 7, 2025, Marpai, Inc. (OTCQX: MRAI), a prominent player in cutting-edge healthcare technology and Third-Party Administration (TPA) services, is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on Thursday, August 14 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: BioLife Solutions had a successful Q2 2025 with $23.0 million in Cell Processing revenue, 62% GAAP gross margin, and $15.8 million GAAP net loss.
data.description: Revenue from Cell Processing saw a significant increase, reaching $23.0 million, a 28% rise from Q2 2024. The GAAP gross margin stood at 62%, while the non-GAAP adjusted gross margin was reported at 65%. Despite this positive performance, there was a GAAP net loss of $15.8 million, which included a $15.5 million non-cash IPR&D expense. On the non-GAAP side, the adjusted EBITDA was $6.1 million, representing 24% of the revenue. These numbers indicate a promising outlook for the company, showing significant growth potential in the market.

data.title: OneSkin receives $20M investment from Prelude Growth Partners to advance skin longevity innovation.
data.description: In San Francisco on August 7, 2025, skincare brand OneSkin, known for its focus on skin longevity through biotech and scientific research, revealed a significant milestone. The company secured a $20 million Series A funding from Prelude Growth Partners, a prominent growth equity firm. This investment, finalized in the previous month, symbolizes a major step forward for OneSkin in its mission to revolutionize the skincare industry.

data.title: Momentum Real Estate sells Provenza at Indian Trail, a 204-unit apartment community in Indian Trail, North Carolina.
data.description: Momentum Real Estate Partners, LLC has completed the sale of Provenza at Indian Trail, a top-tier apartment complex in Indian Trail, NC. The property, situated at 1021 Glenn Valley Lane, comprises 204 Class A units and is part of the larger Charlotte market. Mauricio Gruener, Co-President and Co-CEO of Momentum, highlighted the strategic efforts that led to the successful transaction, noting the development potential of the submarket at the time of acquisition. The sale marks a significant milestone in the company's portfolio growth strategy.

data.title: EverBank announces offering of $200 million fixed-to-floating rate subordinated notes due 2035.
data.description: Today, EverBank Financial Corp, a financial holding company operating through its subsidiary EverBank, N.A., revealed the pricing for its $200 million offering. The announcement was made in Jacksonville, Fla. on August 7, 2025.

data.title: Latest news on Myriad: Bitcoin price predictions, Ethereum holdings, and mentions of Vitalik. Stay updated! #crypto #BTC #ETH
data.description: This week, Myriad's top markets feature forecasts on the price of Bitcoin and markets linked to the Ethereum creators. These markets are gaining significant traction, with a growing number of users showing interest in predicting the future prices of Bitcoin. Additionally, markets associated with Ethereum founders are also proving popular, indicating a strong trend towards engaging with influential figures in the crypto space. These markets are attracting substantial activity and attention, with growing participation from users eager to make predictions and investments in these volatile yet enticing markets.
